title: calicotome spinosa subsp. infesta
intro: Calicotome spinosa subsp. infesta, also known as thorny broom or calicotome, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Calicotome spinosa subsp. infesta include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, and it has also been used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Calicotome spinosa subsp. infesta can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
